subcodes.title: Letter to Haji Mirza Siyyid 'Ali, Khal-i-A'zam, from Kinar Takht
subcodes.first_line: It is submitted that on Wednesday night, the nineteenth, We departed from the port of Bushihr in the company of Akbar, who was bound for his native land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو قبله گاها. معروض مى دارد که شب چهارشنبه نوزدهم ازبندر بوشهرحرکت نموده به اتفاق اکبر که وارد بلد وطن باشد
